instructions: The branch has merge conflicts — rebase onto `origin/main` per your repository's conventions to resolve them, then push.

If you decide to push new commits: cancel each in-progress run listed under `## In-progress runs` before applying code fixes (e.g. `gh run cancel <id>`). Skip this step if you are only resolving threads without pushing — the existing runs remain relevant.

Stop this iteration — if you pushed new commits, CI needs time before the next tick; otherwise stop before the next tick. Recheck: rerun `npx pr-shepherd 42` to recheck once after a fresh 30s–4m delay.
